name: IntuneDebug
description: A PowerShell module for Intune MDM policy reporting and debugging, similar to GPResult. Generates HTML reports showing device information, Intune sync status, applied settings by policy scope, Win32 app assignments, script policies, remediation status, LAPS settings, and certificate assignments.
keywords: how to check applied intune policies
which policies are applied to device
author: Jonas Ohmsen

securityCheck.aiSummary: Overall assessment: IntuneDebug appears to be a legitimate Intune debugging tool with no direct evidence of remote code execution, credential theft, or data exfiltration in the provided code. However, there are attack-surface concerns: dynamic loading of private/public helper scripts at module import, potential exposure of certificate metadata, and unescaped HTML rendering in reports. Remediate by ensuring integrity of helper scripts, restricting access to certificate stores, and escaping all untrusted data when generating HTML reports.
